title: Paluruvu
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Paluruvu''' was an expensive violet-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Perfume/Legends|perfume]] from the [[Dzavak Lakes]] district of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] that was often sold by the [[Qulun]]. A large flagon of the perfume was created by diluting a few drops of the pure essence with clear [[Water/Legends|water]]. Paluruvu not only excited the sense of smell, but it could also have a soporific effect on most [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
